LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS.description: The 钢铁兄弟会 maintains strict military discipline and a reverence for pre-war technology. Members follow the Codex, value the chain of command, and see themselves as preservers of knowledge in a barbaric world.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS.label: 钢铁兄弟会 chapter
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS_Outcasts.description: 流放者是纯粹主义者，他们拒绝接受里昂长老对法典的偏离。他们完全致力于获取和保存技术，最多将外来者视为障碍。使命就是一切。
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_BoS_Outcasts.label: 钢铁兄弟会 Outcasts
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Lyons_BoS.description: 莱昂斯长老的分会脱离了法典，以帮助首都废土的人民。他的追随者将兄弟会纪律与同情心结合起来，相信技术应该为人类服务，而不是被人类囤积起来。
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Lyons_BoS.label: 钢铁兄弟会 Lyons
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Legion_NeoRoman.label: 新罗马
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Enclave.description: The 英克雷 represents the remnants of the pre-war United States government, embodying a culture of technological superiority, strict hierarchy, and unwavering loyalty to their vision of a purified America. Members of the 英克雷 are deeply committed to their cause, often viewing themselves as the rightful inheritors of the Earth.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Enclave.label: 英克雷
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Khan.description: 大可汗的文化，一个游牧掠夺部落，是战前摩托帮的后裔。
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Khan.label: 汗
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_NCR_Californian.label: 新加州人
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_PRC_Chinese.description: 中华人民共和国的文化。
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_PRC_Chinese.label: 中国人
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Raider.label: 袭击者
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_USA_American.label: 美国人
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Wastelander.description: Survivors of the post-apocalyptic wasteland, scrapers and scavengers trying to rebuild civilization from the 废墟s.
LanguageData.FCP_Culture_Wastelander.label: Wastelander
